{{Quote|Koril's in bacta somewhere. I saw the medics haul him off.|[[Ninora Birt]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref>}}
'''Koril Bekam''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. He owned [[R2-Z13]]; who aided him while piloting in [[Blackmoon Squadron]] While recovering in [[Bacta/Legends|bacta]], [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] used Bekam's [[X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] to aid in the evacuation of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]].
